sourcesContent:
import { Button, Card, CardActions, CardContent, CardHeader, TextField } from '@material-ui/core'
import React from 'react'

function JoinClass() {
  return (
    <Card variant='outlined'>
        <CardHeader title='Join Classroom' />
        <CardContent>
                <form action="">
                    <TextField placeholder='Class Code' />
                </form>
        </CardContent>
        <CardActions>
        <Button size="small" variant='contained' color='secondary'>Join Classroom</Button>
      </CardActions>
    </Card>
  )
}

export default JoinClass
